hooks.command: python --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -c "import yt_dlp, youtube_transcript_api" 2>/dev/null && echo 'ytmp4-ai-digest: dependencies OK' || echo 'ytmp4-ai-digest: WARNING — missing Python dependencies. Run: pip install -r ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt'

INPUT=$(cat); TOOL_INPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *fetch_videos.py*|*get_transcript.py*|*digest_all.py*|*compare_videos.py*|*generate_report.py*|*capture_frames.py*) echo "ytmp4-ai-digest script detected. Auto-read the output files written by: $TOOL_INPUT";; esac
